management_implication: Anchor for unit plan rollups and statewide progress tracking.

management_implication: Confirms statewide herd below objective.

management_implication: General units managed to one of these bands.

management_implication: LE units target tighter mature buck structure.

management_implication: Premium LE top-end quality bracket.
evidence_excerpt: Manage premium limited-entry units for 40-45 bucks per 100 does.

management_implication: Changes up to plus/minus 20% can be automatic.
evidence_excerpt: Changes over 20% go through RAC and Wildlife Board process.

value: detection of first positive (about 1% prevalence surveillance target)
management_implication: Do not wait for high prevalence before management changes in affected units.
evidence_excerpt: Threshold for CWD management actions in Utah should be set at detection of CWD.

metric: Sample size for at least 1% prevalence detection at 95% confidence
management_implication: Surveillance adequacy benchmark.
evidence_excerpt: Required sample size for 1% prevalence at 95% confidence is 304 deer and 346 elk.
